steps.t: Red clover can be found in the hills near the mine, particularly at Hen Turrau. Melvun has asked you to collect red clover which he can use to make me…
Melvun is at the Barnavon Mine. You should bring the red clover you collected to Melvun.
Melvun is at the Barnavon Mine. You should speak with Melvun again to see if he has finished the salve.
The wounded miners can be found in the camp outside the Barnavon Mine. Melvun asked you to take the salve and bandages to the wounded miners and bind …
Melvun is at the Barnavon Mine. You should speak with Melvun and let him know that you have completed his task.'
